requirement_topic.zh: 萨摩亚本地进口商/代理要求
requirement_topic.zht: 薩摩亞本地進口商/代理要求

summary.en: Samoa requires that radio and telecom terminal equipment placed on the Samoan market is supplied through a locally established importer or authorised agent. The local importer or agent is typically the entity that holds or applies for OCC type approval on behalf of the foreign manufacturer. The importer is responsible for ensuring that equipment supplied complies with OCC type approval conditions, labelling requirements (English and/or Samoan language), and applicable SAME standards. Samoa is a very small market (approximately 220,000 population) and is a Pacific Islands Forum member state; many suppliers appoint a single regional agent covering multiple Pacific Island markets. Chinese manufacturers without a locally established Samoan entity cannot directly sell into the Samoan market without appointing a local importer or agent.
summary.zh: 萨摩亚要求进入萨摩亚市场的无线电及电信终端设备通过在当地设立的进口商或授权代理进行供应。本地进口商或代理通常是代表境外制造商持有或申请OCC型号认证的主体。进口商负责确保所供应设备符合OCC型号认证条件、标签要求（英文和/或萨摩亚语）及适用SAME标准。萨摩亚市场规模极小（约22万人口），为太平洋岛国论坛成员国；许多供应商指定一名覆盖多个太平洋岛国市场的区域代理。未在萨摩亚设有本地实体的中国制造商，不指定本地进口商或代理不得直接向萨摩亚市场销售。
summary.zht: 薩摩亞要求進入薩摩亞市場的無線電及電信終端設備通過在當地設立的進口商或授權代理進行供應。本地進口商或代理通常是代表境外製造商持有或申請OCC型號認證的主體。進口商負責確保所供應設備符合OCC型號認證條件、標籤要求（英文和/或薩摩亞語）及適用SAME標準。薩摩亞市場規模極小（約22萬人口），為太平洋島國論壇成員國；許多供應商指定一名覆蓋多個太平洋島國市場的區域代理。未在薩摩亞設有本地實體的中國製造商，不指定本地進口商或代理不得直接向薩摩亞市場銷售。

standards_or_laws: Communications Act 2016 (Samoa) — OCC authority over type approval holder responsibilities; importer/agent as default approval holder
OCC Type Approval Framework — requires a locally established entity to be the approval holder for radio and telecom equipment supplied in Samoa
Pacific Islands Forum context — Samoa participates in Pacific regional trade frameworks; regional agent structures common across Pacific Island markets

summary.en: In China, the domestic responsible party for SRRC type approval and MIIT NAL is typically the Chinese manufacturer or a designated Chinese entity. No equivalent local-country importer requirement exists for the domestic Chinese market — the manufacturer holds the approvals directly. For export, Chinese manufacturers must comply with the importer or agent requirements of the destination market.
summary.zh: 在中国，SRRC型号认证及MIIT NAL的国内责任主体通常为中国制造商或指定中国实体。国内中国市场不存在等效的本地进口商要求——制造商直接持有相关认证。对于出口，中国制造商须遵守目的地市场的进口商或代理要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，SRRC型號認證及MIIT NAL的國內責任主體通常為中國製造商或指定中國實體。國內中國市場不存在等效的本地進口商要求——製造商直接持有相關認證。對於出口，中國製造商須遵守目的地市場的進口商或代理要求。

standards_or_laws: SRRC — Chinese manufacturer or designee holds the type approval directly
MIIT NAL — Chinese manufacturer holds the Network Access License directly
No equivalent local-country importer regime in China domestic market

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must appoint a locally established Samoan importer or authorised agent before supplying radio or telecom terminal equipment in Samoa. The local importer or agent is typically the OCC type approval holder. Without a local Samoan importer or agent, OCC type approval cannot be obtained and the equipment cannot lawfully be supplied in Samoa. Given the very small market size, Chinese exporters should assess whether the commercial return justifies the cost of appointing a dedicated Samoan agent versus a Pacific regional agent.
gap.zh: 中国制造商在向萨摩亚供应无线电或电信终端设备前，须指定在萨摩亚本地设立的进口商或授权代理。本地进口商或代理通常为OCC型号认证的持有人。若无萨摩亚本地进口商或代理，则无法取得OCC型号认证，设备亦不得合法在萨摩亚供应。鉴于市场规模极小，中国出口商应评估商业回报是否足以支撑指定专属萨摩亚代理的成本，或考虑通过太平洋区域代理覆盖该市场。
gap.zht: 中國製造商在向薩摩亞供應無線電或電信終端設備前，須指定在薩摩亞本地設立的進口商或授權代理。本地進口商或代理通常為OCC型號認證的持有人。若無薩摩亞本地進口商或代理，則無法取得OCC型號認證，設備亦不得合法在薩摩亞供應。鑑於市場規模極小，中國出口商應評估商業回報是否足以支撐指定專屬薩摩亞代理的成本，或考慮通過太平洋區域代理覆蓋該市場。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a locally established Samoan importer or authorised agent is required to hold OCC type approval and supply radio and telecom terminal equipment in Samoa
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — Chinese manufacturers hold SRRC and MIIT NAL approvals directly with no domestic local-importer regime

source.publisher: Office of the Communications Commissioner, Samoa (OCC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A locally established Samoan importer or authorised agent is mandatory for obtaining OCC type approval and lawfully supplying radio or telecom terminal equipment in Samoa. Chinese manufacturers must appoint a Samoan agent before entering the market. Given the very small market size, a Pacific regional agent covering multiple island markets may be a cost-effective approach.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 萨摩亚本地进口商或授权代理是取得OCC型号认证、合法在萨摩亚供应无线电或电信终端设备的强制要求。中国制造商须在进入市场前指定萨摩亚代理。鉴于市场规模极小，覆盖多个岛国市场的太平洋区域代理可能是更具成本效益的方案。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 薩摩亞本地進口商或授權代理是取得OCC型號認證、合法在薩摩亞供應無線電或電信終端設備的強制要求。中國製造商須在進入市場前指定薩摩亞代理。鑑於市場規模極小，覆蓋多個島國市場的太平洋區域代理可能是更具成本效益的方案。
